message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml

package "db" {
  interface ConnectionDB {
  }

  class LazyHolderDB {
    + final INSTANCE : ConnectionDBMySQL
  }

  class ConnectionDBMySQL {
    + connection : Connection
    + ConnectionDBMySQL()
    + getInstance() : ConnectionDBMySQL
    + getDb() : Connection
  }
}

package "gui" {
  package "controller" {
    class OfferController {
      - FAQ : ListView
      - answerQuestion : JButtonBar
      - update : JButtonBar
      - newQuestion : JButtonBar
      - rateArea : JButtonBar
      + handleNewQuestion(actionEvent : ActionEvent) : void
      + handleNewAnswer(actionEvent : ActionEvent) : void
      + handleUpdateQuestion(actionEvent : ActionEvent) : void
      + handleDeleteQuestion(actionEvent : ActionEvent) : void
      + handleDeleteAnswer(actionEvent : ActionEvent) : void
      + handleUpdateScoreQuestion(actionEvent : ActionEvent) : void
      + handleUpdateScoreAnswer(actionEvent : ActionEvent) : void
    }

    class NewQuestionController {
      - questionArea : JTextArea
      - postQuestion : JButtonBar
      - cancel : JButtonBar
      + handleNewQuestion(actionEvent : ActionEvent) : void
      + cancelAction(actionEvent : ActionEvent) : void
    }

    class LoadView {
      + loadfxmlParent : Parent
      + changeScreen(actionEvent : ActionEvent, view : String) : void
    }

    class NewAnswerController {
      - answerArea : JTextArea
      - postAnswer : JButtonBar
      - cancel : JButtonBar
      + handleNewAnswer(actionEvent : ActionEvent) : void
      + cancelAction(actionEvent : ActionEvent) : void
    }
  }
}

package "business" {
  class FAQFacade {
    + getQuestionById(id : int) : Question
    + getAnswerById(id : int) : Answer
    + createAnswer(id : int, userId : int, offerId : int, answerId : int, question : String, score : int) : Question
    + createAnswerId(id : int, userId : int, answer : String, score : int) : Answer
    + getQuestionsByOfferIdofferId(id : int) : ArrayList<Question>
    + getAnswersByOfferId(id : int) : ArrayList<Answer>
    + updateQuestionScore(id : int, userId : int, offerId : int, question : String, score : int) : Question
    + updateAnswerScore(id : int, userId : int, answer : String, score : int) : Answer
    + deleteQuestion(id : int) : boolean
    + deleteAnswer(id : int) : boolean
  }

  class Question {
    - questionId : int
    - content : String
    - score : int
    - answerId : int
    - userId : int
    - offerId : int
    + Question()
    + getQuestionId() : int
    + getContent() : String
    + getScore() : int
    + getAnswer() : Answer
    + getUser() : int
    + getOfferId() : int
    + setId(int) : void
    + setContent(content:String) : void
    + setScore(score:int) : void
    + setAnswer(answer:Answer) : void
    + setUserId(userId:int) : void
    + setOfferId(categoryId:int) : void
  }

  class Answer {
    - answerId : int
    - content : String
    - score : int
    - userId : int
    + Answer()
    + getAnswerId() : int
    + getContent() : String
    + getScore() : int
    + getUserId() : int
    + setId(int) : void
    + setContent(content:String) : void
    + setScore(score:int) : void
    + setAnswer(answer:Answer) : void
    + setUserId(userId:int) : void
  }

  class SessionFacade {
    + SessionFacade()
    + getUser() : User
  }
}

package "dao" {
  interface DAO {
    findById(id : int) : T
    create(T obj) : T
    update(T obj) : T
    delete(T obj) : boolean
  }

  abstract class AnswerDao {
    + OfferDao()
    + getInstance() : QuestionDao
    + LazyHolder()
    + getAnswersByOfferId(offerId : int) : ArrayList<Answer>
    + answerExists(id : int) : boolean
  }

  abstract class QuestionDao {
    + OfferDao()
    + getInstance() : QuestionDao
    + LazyHolder()
    + getQuestionsByOfferId(offerId : int) : ArrayList<Question>
    + questionExists(id : int) : boolean
    + hasAnAnswer(id : int) : boolean
  }

  abstract class AbstractFactoryDao {
    + final connectionDB : ConnectionDB
    + getFactoryType(TypeDB) : AbstractFactoryDao
    + getAnswerDaoDao
    + getQuestionDao() : QuestionDao
  }

  class AnswerDaoMySQL {
  }

  class QuestionDaoMySQL {
  }

  class FactoryDaoMySQL {
  }
}

' Relationships in db
ConnectionDB <|.. ConnectionDBMySQL
LazyHolderDB ..> ConnectionDBMySQL

' Relationships gui to business
OfferController ..> FAQFacade
NewQuestionController ..> FAQFacade
NewAnswerController ..> FAQFacade

' Relationships business to dao
FAQFacade ..> AnswerDao
FAQFacade ..> QuestionDao

' DAO hierarchy
DAO <|.. AnswerDao
DAO <|.. QuestionDao
AnswerDao <|-- AnswerDaoMySQL
QuestionDao <|-- QuestionDaoMySQL
AbstractFactoryDao <|-- FactoryDaoMySQL

' AbstractFactoryDao uses ConnectionDB
AbstractFactoryDao ..> ConnectionDB

@enduml
```
